name: soft98-ad-blocker-extension
description: Chrome, Edge, and Firefox extension for resilient Soft98 ad blocking, anti-adblock patching, and Soft98 Pro enhancements.

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check src/page/runtime.js && node --check src/content/bridge.js && node --check src/content/firefox-injector.js && node --check src/ui/options.js
